prompt: Create an ultra-premium editorial studio portrait of a young Black man in clean left-facing side profile, shown from mid-thigh to head against a seamless dark charcoal black background. The subject is a young Black man with short natural black hair and smooth medium-dark brown skin, standing upright with a calm, serious, composed expression, eyes looking straight ahead to the left, lips relaxed, jawline defined, and posture elegant. He wears a fitted navy blue short-sleeve button-up shirt with fine vertical pinstripes, tucked into tailored black trousers, with one visible hand resting in his trouser pocket and a black wristwatch on that wrist. Use a refined fashion-editorial look with realistic skin texture, crisp fabric detail, subtle highlights on the cheekbone, nose bridge, ear, neck, and forearm, and soft shadow falloff. Lighting should feel premium but not flashy: a large soft key light from the front-left, gentle rim separation from the background, controlled contrast, no harsh studio glare. Compose vertically in a 2:3 frame, subject positioned slightly left of center with negative space on the right, full side silhouette clearly readable. Photorealistic, high-end magazine portrait, shallow but natural depth of field, sharp focus on face and upper body, matte dark backdrop, no text, no props besides the single wristwatch, no extra people, no watermark.
promptEn: Create an ultra-premium editorial studio portrait of a young Black man in clean left-facing side profile, shown from mid-thigh to head against a seamless dark charcoal black background. The subject is a young Black man with short natural black hair and smooth medium-dark brown skin, standing upright with a calm, serious, composed expression, eyes looking straight ahead to the left, lips relaxed, jawline defined, and posture elegant. He wears a fitted navy blue short-sleeve button-up shirt with fine vertical pinstripes, tucked into tailored black trousers, with one visible hand resting in his trouser pocket and a black wristwatch on that wrist. Use a refined fashion-editorial look with realistic skin texture, crisp fabric detail, subtle highlights on the cheekbone, nose bridge, ear, neck, and forearm, and soft shadow falloff. Lighting should feel premium but not flashy: a large soft key light from the front-left, gentle rim separation from the background, controlled contrast, no harsh studio glare. promptZh: 创作一张超高端编辑风格的摄影棚肖像，主角为一名面朝左侧的年轻黑人男性，画面呈现从大腿中部到头部的构图，背景为无缝的深炭黑色。主体为 一位留着短自然黑发、拥有光滑中深棕色皮肤的年轻黑人男性，站姿挺拔，表情冷静、严肃且从容，双眼直视左前方，双唇放松，下颌线轮廓分明，姿态优雅。他身穿 一件修身海军蓝短袖衬衫，带有细微的垂直条纹，下摆束入剪裁合身的黑色长裤中，一只手插在裤兜里，手腕上戴着一块黑色手表。采用精致的时尚编辑风格，呈现逼真的皮肤纹理、清晰的织物细节，颧骨、鼻梁、耳朵、颈部和前臂处有细腻的高光，阴影过渡柔和。光影效果应呈现高端质感而非浮夸：左前方采用大型柔光主灯，背景带有柔和的轮廓分离光，对比度受控，无刺眼的摄影棚强光。采用 2:3 纵向构图，主体位于画面中心偏左位置，右侧留有负空间，清晰展现完整的侧面轮廓。超写实，高端杂志肖像，浅而自然的景深，面部和上半身焦点清晰，哑光深色背景，无文字，除手表外无其他道具，无额外人物，无水印。
